market_context: SPY and QQQ both sit at 98.3% of their 52-week ranges and are well above their 20MA and 50MA (SPY +5.9%/+5.1%, QQQ +7.5%/+7.2%). SPY flat pre-market (-0.12%), QQQ slight bid (+0.28%). S&P 500 futures +0.37%, Nasdaq futures +0.43% driven by potential US-Iran peace talks. Broad posture: risk-on, bullish bias for today.

trades.context: Amazon announced an expanded strategic collaboration with Anthropic overnight, providing a fresh AI-narrative catalyst. Stock is +10.5% above its 20MA ($223.51) and +15.1% above its 50MA ($214.73), pre-market +0.93% to $249.37. The 52-week high of $258.60 sits 3.7% above the pre-market print and is the near-term technical target. Positive macro backdrop — Iran peace-talk optimism, Nasdaq futures +0.43% — adds sector tailwind.
if_conditions: AMZN holds above $247.00 at the open (yesterday's close / primary support level)
QQQ is not declining more than -0.8% at 9:35am ET
No secondary news contradicting or reversing the Anthropic collaboration announcement before entry
trades.invalidation: If AMZN opens below $246.00 and does not recover above $247.00 within 15 minutes, skip entirely.

trades.context: GOOGL closed at $338.71 and is pre-market +0.65% to $340.92, sitting at 95.1% of its 52-week range ($145.60–$348.75) — just 2.3% below a potential all-time breakout level. The stock is +9.99% above both its 20MA ($307.96) and 50MA ($307.93), confirming strong trend alignment. AI sector strength, Iran peace-talk optimism, and Nasdaq futures +0.43% all support a push toward the $348.75 52-week high.
if_conditions: GOOGL holds above $337.00 at the open (1% pullback tolerance anchored to pre-market level / intraday support)
QQQ is not declining more than -0.8% at 9:35am ET
GOOGL trades above $341.00 within the first 30 minutes of session open, confirming breakout continuation
trades.invalidation: If GOOGL fails to trade above $341.00 within the first 30 minutes of the session, skip and wait for a cleaner entry.
